name: Burnt Othur Fumes
entries: A creature subjected to Burnt Othur Fumes must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or take 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and it must repeat the save at the start of each of its turns. On each successive failed save, the creature takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage. After three successful saves, the poison ends.
